interventions.name: R3 Intervention 1
interventions.summary: before-and-after table comparisons that label the transformation rule explicitly

interventions.name: R3 Intervention 2
interventions.summary: column-meaning checks requiring each data field to be interpreted in context

interventions.name: R3 Intervention 3
interventions.summary: model-versus-original-data routines that distinguish representation from source information

interventions.name: R3 Intervention 4
interventions.summary: near-transfer transformation tasks that preserve the same rule in a second bounded dataset
